prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约10145→8842→8408→10528→12878，近两年连续后移，2025年基准约12878名，较2024年后移约2350名，呈明显下行趋势；该校在吉林省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年10人、2022年8人、2023年9人、2024年14人、2025年14人；2026年计划大幅增至23人，较2025年扩招约64%，竞争压力显著加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约125–131名，2026年回升至125名，整体层次稳定；2026年声誉数据中未见辽宁大学明显负面事件；抖音热度总排名第105位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等偏低；近年无投档断档记录，报考心理预期平稳；第五轮学科评估中应用经济学获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，经济管理类学科底蕴深厚；法学、计算机类、电子信息类等专业亦有较强实力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年相关专业大类热度：电子信息/通信"高热推荐"、电气工程"高热推荐"、计算机类"推荐"（较2023年明显降温）、法学"分化观望"、金融/财经"分化观望"、新闻传播"明显劝退"；吉林省2026年高考总人数约110868人，较2025年（约111492人）基本持平，竞争总量变化不大；2026年；辽宁大学位于邻省沈阳，对吉林考生具有天然的地缘吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次连续后移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招（14→23人）导致竞争加剧、考生总数基本持平、学校声誉平稳等因素，在2025年基准12878名基础上预计位次继续后移；但大幅扩招可能吸引更多考生报考，实际位次后移幅度略小于纯供需弹性理论值。预测最低位次约17645名，区间17145–18145名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 10145 → 8842 → 8408 → 10528 → 12878, with a continuous decline in the last two years. The 2025 baseline is about 12878, a drop of about 2350 from 2024, showing a clear downward trend. The enrollment plan for science/physics category in Jilin Province: 10 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 14 in 2024, 14 in 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly increases to 23, an expansion of about 64% compared to 2025, intensifying competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking in recent years around 125–131, rising to 125 in 2026, overall level stable; no significant negative events for Liaoning University in 2026 reputation data; Douyin heat total ranking 105th, rated as 'average', short video exposure moderately low; no record of enrollment gaps in recent years, stable psychological expectations for applicants; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline, with deep heritage in economics and management; Law, Computer Science, Electronic Information, and other majors also have strong strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 related major categories heat: Electronic Information/Communication 'highly recommended', Electrical Engineering 'highly recommended', Computer Science 'recommended' (significantly cooled compared to 2023), Law 'divergence and wait-and-see', Finance/Economics 'divergence and wait-and-see', Journalism/Communication 'clearly discouraged'; total number of candidates in Jilin Province for 2026 college entrance exam about 110,868, basically flat compared to 2025 (about 111,492), overall competition volume little change; 2026; Liaoning University is located in neighboring province Shenyang, naturally attractive to Jilin candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings, the significant expansion of enrollment plan in 2026 (14→23) leading to intensified competition, basically flat total number of candidates, stable school reputation, etc., based on the 2025 baseline of 12878, the ranking is expected to continue to decline; however, the large expansion may attract more candidates to apply, so the actual decline in ranking is slightly less than the pure supply-demand elasticity theoretical value. Predicted minimum ranking about 17645, range 17145–18145.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 17145–18145, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as reach and Tier 3 as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit (<17145), focus on reaching for popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; if your ranking is near the lower limit (>18145), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety and pay attention to relatively lower-ranked majors in Tier 2.
